reviews.review_description:
This looked like it might be fun to play. I really enjoy freerunning/parkour in VR but unfortunately this app isn't playable. Every time I tried to join a lobby or go to the tutorial the game crashed. This happened 7 times in a row before I gave up and played something else. 

Hey Dev - Fix your game and I'll update my review accordingly. If you can't make an app stable enough to load then I'd suggest a new profession ASAP
Every time I opened the app all I got was a black screen
